SpTU 4, 171 [observations of Saturn][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (missing)
Reverse
Column i
(start of column missing)
rr  (traces of 1 line)
r i 2'2'

[...] ⸢15 ana NIM⸣ LA₂is DU₆ 28 ina KIR₄ šil-taḫ

(r i 2') [...]. On 15 [...] it retrograded to the east. On 28 Tašritu (Month VII) it set at the tip [of] Pabilsag's arrow. On 4 Kislimu (Month VIII) it (re-)appeared at the end of Pabilsag's arrow. In intercalary Addaru (Month XII/1) it became stationary in Pabilsag. I did not observe (it).

r i 3'3'

[x] PA.BIL.<SAG> ŠU₂ GAN 4 ina TIL šil-taḫ ša₂ PA.<BIL>.SAG IGI

r i 4'4'

DIRI.ŠE ina mulPA.BIL.SAG UŠ NU PAP

r i 5'5'

MU 29v ŠU 1 ana tar-ṣi mulza-ap-pi šil-taḫ

(r i 5') In year 29, on 1 Duʾuzu (Month IV) it became stationary 1 1/2 cubits above the bristles of Pablisag's arrow. From (day) 10 it retrograded to the east.

r i 6'6'

ša₂ PA.BIL.SAG 1.1/2 KUŠ₃ UŠ TA 10 ana NIM LA₂sa

r i 7'7'

KIN 21 ina MURU₂ PA.BIL.<SAG> ŠU₂ APIN 27

(r i 7') On 21 Ululu (Month VI) it set in the middle of Pabilsag. On 27 Arahsamnu (Month VIII) it (re-)appeared opposite Pabilsag's chariot box.

r i 8'8'

ina IGI ka-lak-ku ša₂ PA.BIL.<SAG> IGI

r i 9'9'

MU 30 BAR ina SAG ITI 3 KUŠ₃ 4 MUL-ME

(r i 9') In year 30, in Nisannu (Month I) at the start of the month it became stationary 3 cubits <...> the 4 stars in the ... of Pabilsag.1 On about (day) 10 it retrograded to the west.

r i 10'10'

ina x-ME ša₂ PA.BIL.SAG UŠ in TA 10

r i 11'11'

ana ŠU₂ LA₂ DU₆ 20.5/6 KUŠ₃ šap-lat MUL₂ TUR

(r i 11') In Tašritu (Month VII) it became stationary 20 5/6 cubits below the small star of Pabilsag, 3 cubits above the chariot box, and retrograded to the east. On 14 Arahsamnu (Month VIII) it set above Pabilsag's chariot box. On 2 Kislimu (Month IX) it (re-)appeared.

r i 12'12'

ša₂ PA.BIL.SAG 3 KUŠ₃ e-lat ka-lak-ku

r i 13'13'

UŠ u ana NIM LA₂is APIN 14 e-lat

r i 14'14'

ka-lak-ku ša₂ PA.BIL.<SAG> ŠU₂ GAN 2 IGI

r i 15'15'

MU 31 BAR in 20 5 KUŠ₃ ina IGI SUḪUR.MAŠ

(r i 15') In year 31, on (about) 20 Nisannu (Month I), it became stationary 5 cubits in front of the Goatfish. From (day) 20 it retrograded to the west. On 20 Abu (Month V) it became stationary at the tip of Pabilsag's arrow.

r i 16'16'

UŠ TA 20 ana ŠU₂ LA₂sa NE 20 ina ap-pi

r i 17'17'

šil-taḫ ša₂ PA.BIL.SAG UŠ TA ⸢10⸣ [...]

(r i 17') On (about day) 10 [...] it retrograded to the east. [...] ... Arahsamnu (Month VIII) [...] at the start [...]

r i 18'18'

⸢ana⸣ GIŠ.⸢NIM LA₂⸣ [...] DIRI ⸢APIN⸣ [...]

r i 19'19'

ana ⸢SAG?⸣ [...]

1 A preposition is missing from this sentence . The illegible word must be "east " or "west"
